content:
Moonshot AI’s 2.8T model beats every AI on the benchmarks except Claude Fable 5 and GPT 5.6 Sol; open weights July 27.

7 min read
Just now

--

Another Chinese lab claiming frontier performance is a headline that has appeared so often this year that most of us stopped clicking on it, but this time the stock market clicked on our behalf.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

If you cant read the article further than please click here
Moonshot AI put out Kimi K3 on July 16, and by Friday the Philadelphia Semiconductor Index was closing out its worst week in more than 15 months, down 12.5%. Nvidia, AMD and Broadcom all sold off, SoftBank (which everyone treats as an OpenAI proxy) lost 9%, and Z.ai, Moonshot’s domestic rival, got hammered in Hong Kong to the tune of almost 30%. The word “DeepSeek” started trending again, and not because of anything DeepSeek had done.
So it is worth slowing down and asking what this thing actually is, because underneath the panic there is a genuinely interesting model.
The short version
Kimi K3 is the new flagship from Moonshot AI, a Beijing startup that has been around since 2023 and counts Alibaba, Tencent and Meituan among its backers. Moonshot is…
